title: Candidate shortlist
description: The candidate-surfacing module's structured output: listed companies that express the locked thesis. Written to screener/runs/<SIG_ID>/candidates.json and copied to screener/ledger/candidates/<thesis_id>.json. This is the FIRST artifact in the pipeline allowed to contain tickers.

beneficiary_ref.description: The M0_3 party id this candidate expresses (e.g. DIR-001).

exposure_score.description: How purely this company expresses the thesis (revenue/EBITDA share tied to the affected industry, quantified where possible).

pair_with.description: candidate_id of the other leg, for pair expressions.

news_impact.description: OPTIONAL — the News-Impact Estimation read (frameworks/screener/NEWS_IMPACT.md) folded in from screener-news-impact-sizing. Sizes the move the originating news JUSTIFIES on fundamentals (ΔValue / Market Cap, or (1+ΔE)(1+ΔM)−1 in primary mode) and compares it to the observed move. A fundamentals FLOOR, not a verdict: it never changes routing or the exposure/edge score.

applicable.description: False for a diffuse macro/policy/commodity signal with no single issuer to size.

mode.description: primary = consensus base AND forward multiple available; fallback = single-criterion ΔValue/MktCap, multiple held constant.

missing_reason.description: When fallback or not_applicable: which feed was missing / why no sizing.

recurrence.description: The swing input — decides how the earnings delta becomes a value (after-tax cash / capitalise at the multiple / NPV).

event_quantification.description: Revenue after pass-throughs → after-tax margin → annual after-tax earnings delta, with a §5 citation.

delta_value.description: ΔValue in the company's own currency, with the conversion method (after-tax cash / capitalised at Mx / NPV n-yr @ r%).

implied_move_pct.description: ΔValue / Market Cap (fallback) or (1+ΔE)(1+ΔM)−1 (primary), in percent.

observed_move_pct.description: The dated stock reaction to the news, in percent.

gap_read.description: priced = observed ≈ implied; underpriced_candidate = observed ≪ implied; re_rate_to_judge = observed ≫ implied (a re-rate handed to the analyst).

caveats.description: Duration-trap check, scope blind-spots (optionality / momentum re-rate), and the fundamentals-floor reminder.

handoff_status.description: Filled/updated by /screener:handoff — which candidates were sent to the research swarm.
